block.text: You leave the military display and take a short cut through a hallway overlooking a huge gallery. As you look down, you are surprised to see devasta­tion! A huge area of exhibits has been demolished. Two black-clad Karossean soldiers are lying there, dead or wounded, and a trail of devastation leads right through a huge hole in the wall. You hear shouts from below.

choice.text: Go back to the information desk.
